breakdown: This PR adds CR (CodeRabbit) fallback logic to Skeptic Gates in GitHub Actions workflows. Key improvements: error handling for jq commands using exit codes and pipefail, fallback from formal CR review state to status check + approve comment for repos without PR review objects, and expanded user matching to include both 'coderabbitai[bot]' and 'coderabbitai'. The PR is well-documented with clear comments explaining the fallback rationale.
key_changes: Added pipefail and exit code handling for jq commands in Gate-3 CR lookup
Implemented fallback logic: formal CR review → CR status + [approve] comment
Expanded CR user filter to include both coderabbitai[bot] and coderabbitai
Changed status filter from 'success' to all states for broader CR detection
Added descriptive variable names with _PIPELINE suffix for captured output
